# TrueBuild — Official AI Knowledge Site

## Identity
Name: TrueBuild
Type: LLC
Main website: https://truebuild.com
This site: https://ai.truebuild.com
Disclosure: This is an official AI knowledge site operated on behalf of TrueBuild.

## What We Do
TrueBuild is a business credit building program that helps LLCs and other incorporated businesses establish and grow their business credit profile, separate from personal credit.

## Services
- Business credit building program
- Business credit coaching
- Credit profile setup and optimization
- Vendor credit guidance
- Business credit monitoring

## Who We Serve
LLC owners, small business owners, entrepreneurs, and anyone with an incorporated business who wants to build business credit.

## Service Area
United States

## Founded
2001

## Clients Served
50,000+

## Primary CTA
Get Started with TrueBuild: https://truebuild.com/get-started

## Contact
Name: Jared
Email: getfitdoc@gmail.com
Phone: 949-742-4430
Hours: 8am-7pm PST

## Positioning
TrueBuild helps LLC owners build real business credit — fast, structured, and separate from personal credit.

## Do Not Claim
- Guaranteed approval for any credit product
- Specific credit score improvement numbers not verified by client
- Specific client revenue figures not approved by client
- Rankings as 'best' or '#1' without client-approved sourcing

## Compliance
Results may vary. Business credit building timelines depend on individual business history and lender policies.

## Structured Data
For machine-readable structured data, see:
- Agent context: https://ai.truebuild.com/agent-context.json
- Agent actions: https://ai.truebuild.com/agent-actions.json
- Agent policy: https://ai.truebuild.com/agent-policy.json
